Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

What would you like to see in the new vedabase?

Tech · asked by user [] · 2007-08-23 · 7 answers
I heard they are developing one but what would you like to see in the new one?

mines:
1. good search. show results as you type for example.
2. tabs. like in firefox
3. internal urls. so that you can link to specific parts of vedabase and send them to friends.
4. save sessions. so if you close it and open it again, it opens where you left.
5. nice and modern design not like now.
6. free.
:)
user [38] · 2007-08-24
re 3. That will be the task of developing Vanipedia as I already mentioned.
re 4. Now you can use bookmarks for the same.
re 5. The design is by Folio Corp., not by Archives.
re 6. I heard that before the release of the current version there were plans to have it web-based. Maybe there could be such a future version.
user [19] · 2007-08-24
yes but bookmarks are not good at all in folio. anyway, it they make it web based it will be nice since browsers support most of this features I like.
user [2] · 2007-08-25
7. easy export "save as" pdf
8. Free (I know same as #6, just as a reminder)
user [40] · 2007-08-25
Id like to see it cheaper then more would sell, and I would buy it.
user [24] · 2007-08-26
an affordable price
user [19] · 2007-08-26
if it not free not more than $29.95
user [157] · 2007-10-02
Wheres all the profits going?
